name: openidentity-axiomid-site
description: AxiomID/OpenIdentity static frontend, bilingual docs, and agentic discovery index for AI agent identity.

scripts.check:json: python3 -m json.tool schema/openidentity.schema.json >/dev/null && python3 -m json.tool dist/agentic-index.json >/dev/null && python3 -m json.tool i18n/en.json >/dev/null && python3 -m json.tool i18n/ar.json >/dev/null
scripts.check:frontend: python3 -m http.server 8765 --directory frontend >/tmp/openidentity-http.log 2>&1 & echo $! > /tmp/openidentity-http.pid; sleep 1; curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8765/ >/tmp/openidentity-index.html; kill $(cat /tmp/openidentity-http.pid)
scripts.check: npm run build:index && npm run check:json && npm run check:frontend
